calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Defendant. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to Arbitrate is heard this day. There being no appearance nor objection filed by Plaintiff, the court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to Arbitrate is heard this day. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/26/2008 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)
